title: p2present presentation manifest
description: Schema for a p2present.json v1.0 manifest. See SPEC.md for prose + examples. Every src (video/deck/asset) may be an https URL, an ipfs:// CID, or a magnet: link.

title.description: Presentation title (shown in the header / document title).

video.description: The talk video. `sources` is an ordered fallback list: the player tries each until one loads.

provider.description: youtube (iframe), mp4 (HTML5 video), webtorrent (magnet streamed via file.renderTo), and ipfs (gateway-resolved CID). Sources are an ordered fallback list, so a failed p2p source falls through to the next.

src.description: youtube: video id or watch/youtu.be URL. mp4: URL to the file (resolved against the manifest URL if relative). webtorrent: magnet. ipfs: CID or ipfs:// URI.

poster.description: Optional poster image URL (used by the mp4 provider).

deck.description: The slide deck. `sources` is an ordered fallback list of URLs.

src.description: URL to the deck (resolved against the manifest URL if relative).

slideCount.description: Total slide count (used for the counter when the deck can't report it).

thumbnails.description: Optional authored slide thumbnails for the scrubber preview. Either an array of image URLs (indexed by slide, 1-based) or an array of {slide, src}. URLs resolve against the manifest URL if relative. PDF decks auto-render thumbnails when this is omitted; HTML decks fall back to a slide-label card.

timing.description: Slide-boundary cues. Either an inline array of cues OR a string path/URL to an external JSON file (an array, or an object with a `timing` array).

time.description: Cue time in float SECONDS, or a "HH:MM:SS.mmm" / "MM:SS" string.

oneOf.description: Path/URL to an external timing JSON file.

subtitles.description: Caption tracks. Rendered as native <track> on mp4, or a synced overlay on YouTube.

lang.description: BCP-47 language tag (or any unique key).

label.description: Human label shown in the CC menu.

src.description: URL to the .vtt or .srt file (resolved against the manifest URL if relative).

format.description: Caption format. Inferred from the file extension if omitted (.srt → srt, else vtt).

default.description: If true, this track is shown by default.

resolvers.description: Override the default networks the phase-2 providers consume.

ipfsGateways.description: IPFS gateway URL templates; use {cid} as a placeholder.

layout.description: Default layout. The user's interactive changes are persisted in localStorage and override these.

split.description: Slides-pane fraction of the split (0–1; clamped 0.15–0.85). Default 0.6.
